mapper.select: SELECT h.doc_no, 'CSRQ' AS document_type, h.company, h.store, h.supplier_code, h.supplier_contract, NULL AS customer_code, NULL AS customer_branch, d.item_code, d.request_qty AS qty, NULL AS unit_price, NULL AS line_amount, d.request_uom AS uom, h.status, h.reference_no, CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) AS business_date, h.created_at FROM csrq_header h JOIN csrq_detail d ON d.csrq_id = h.id WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR h.company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR h.store = #{store}) AND (#{supplierCode} IS NULL OR h.supplier_code = #{supplierCode}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.status = #{status}) AND (#{fromDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) >= #{fromDate}) AND (#{toDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) <= #{toDate}) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC

SELECT h.doc_no, 'CSRV' AS document_type, h.company, h.receiving_store AS store, h.supplier_code, h.supplier_contract, NULL AS customer_code, NULL AS customer_branch, d.item_code, d.receiving_qty AS qty, NULL AS unit_price, NULL AS line_amount, NULL AS uom, h.status, h.reference_no, CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) AS business_date, h.created_at FROM csrv_header h JOIN csrv_detail d ON d.csrv_id = h.id WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR h.company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR h.receiving_store = #{store}) AND (#{supplierCode} IS NULL OR h.supplier_code = #{supplierCode}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.status = #{status}) AND (#{fromDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) >= #{fromDate}) AND (#{toDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) <= #{toDate}) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC

SELECT h.doc_no, 'CSO' AS document_type, h.company, h.store, h.supplier_code, h.supplier_contract, h.customer_code, h.customer_branch, d.item_code, d.qty, NULL AS unit_price, NULL AS line_amount, d.uom, h.status, h.reference_no, CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) AS business_date, h.created_at FROM cso_header h JOIN cso_detail d ON d.cso_id = h.id WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR h.company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR h.store = #{store}) AND (#{customerCode} IS NULL OR h.customer_code = #{customerCode}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.status = #{status}) AND (#{fromDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) >= #{fromDate}) AND (#{toDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) <= #{toDate}) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC

SELECT h.doc_no, 'CSDO' AS document_type, h.company, h.store, NULL AS supplier_code, NULL AS supplier_contract, h.customer_code, h.customer_branch, d.item_code, d.qty, NULL AS unit_price, NULL AS line_amount, d.uom, h.status, NULL AS reference_no, CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) AS business_date, h.created_at FROM csdo_header h JOIN csdo_detail d ON d.csdo_id = h.id WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR h.company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR h.store = #{store}) AND (#{customerCode} IS NULL OR h.customer_code = #{customerCode}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.status = #{status}) AND (#{fromDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) >= #{fromDate}) AND (#{toDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) <= #{toDate}) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC

SELECT h.doc_no, 'CSR' AS document_type, h.company, h.store, h.supplier_code, h.supplier_contract, NULL AS customer_code, NULL AS customer_branch, d.item_code, COALESCE(d.actual_qty, d.qty) AS qty, NULL AS unit_price, NULL AS line_amount, d.uom, h.status, h.reference_no, CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) AS business_date, h.created_at FROM csr_header h JOIN csr_detail d ON d.csr_id = h.id WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR h.company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR h.store = #{store}) AND (#{supplierCode} IS NULL OR h.supplier_code = #{supplierCode}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.status = #{status}) AND (#{fromDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) >= #{fromDate}) AND (#{toDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) <= #{toDate}) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC

SELECT h.doc_no, 'CSA' AS document_type, h.company, h.store, h.supplier_code, h.supplier_contract, NULL AS customer_code, NULL AS customer_branch, d.item_code, d.qty, NULL AS unit_price, NULL AS line_amount, d.uom, h.status, h.reference_no, CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) AS business_date, h.created_at FROM csa_header h JOIN csa_detail d ON d.csa_id = h.id WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR h.company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR h.store = #{store}) AND (#{supplierCode} IS NULL OR h.supplier_code = #{supplierCode}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.status = #{status}) AND (#{fromDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) >= #{fromDate}) AND (#{toDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) <= #{toDate}) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC

SELECT h.doc_no, 'SETTLEMENT' AS document_type, h.company, h.store, h.supplier_code, h.supplier_contract, h.customer_code, NULL AS customer_branch, NULL AS item_code, NULL AS qty, NULL AS unit_price, h.total_amount AS line_amount, h.currency AS uom, h.status, h.reference_no, CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) AS business_date, h.created_at FROM settlement_request_header h WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR h.company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR h.store = #{store}) AND (#{settlementType} IS NULL OR h.settlement_type = #{settlementType}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.status = #{status}) AND (#{fromDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) >= #{fromDate}) AND (#{toDate} IS NULL OR CAST(h.created_at AS DATE) <= #{toDate}) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC

SELECT h.doc_no, d.document_type, h.company, h.store, h.supplier_code, h.supplier_contract, h.customer_code, NULL AS customer_branch, d.item_code, d.qty, d.unit_price, d.line_amount, d.uom, h.status, d.document_no AS reference_no, CAST(d.created_at AS DATE) AS business_date, d.created_at FROM settlement_request_detail d JOIN settlement_request_header h ON h.id = d.settlement_id WHERE d.settlement_id = #{settlementId} ORDER BY d.created_at ASC

SELECT b.store, b.supplier_code, b.supplier_contract, b.sku, b.purchase_qty, b.closing_qty, b.unbill_qty FROM supplier_book_value_inventory b JOIN consignment_external_supplier s ON s.supplier_code = b.supplier_code AND s.consignee_store = b.store WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR s.consignee_company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR b.store = #{store}) AND (#{supplierCode} IS NULL OR b.supplier_code = #{supplierCode}) AND (#{supplierContract} IS NULL OR b.supplier_contract = #{supplierContract}) ORDER BY b.store, b.supplier_code, b.sku

SELECT issue_from_store, customer_code, branch_code, sku, qty FROM customer_consignment_inventory WHERE (#{store} IS NULL OR issue_from_store = #{store}) AND (#{customerCode} IS NULL OR customer_code = #{customerCode}) AND qty != 0 ORDER BY issue_from_store, customer_code, sku

SELECT r.doc_no, r.doc_type AS document_type, NULL AS company, r.store, NULL AS supplier_code, NULL AS supplier_contract, NULL AS customer_code, NULL AS customer_branch, r.sku AS item_code, r.qty, NULL AS unit_price, NULL AS line_amount, r.reservation_type AS uom, NULL AS status, NULL AS reference_no, CAST(r.created_at AS DATE) AS business_date, r.created_at FROM consignment_reservation r WHERE (#{store} IS NULL OR r.store = #{store}) AND (#{itemCode} IS NULL OR r.sku = #{itemCode}) ORDER BY r.store, r.sku, r.created_at

SELECT s.item_code, 'SETUP' AS document_type, s.consignee_company AS company, s.consignee_store AS store, s.supplier_code, s.supplier_contract, NULL AS customer_code, NULL AS customer_branch, s.item_code AS item_code, NULL AS qty, NULL AS unit_price, NULL AS line_amount, s.supplier_type AS uom, NULL AS status, NULL AS reference_no, NULL AS business_date, s.created_at, NULL AS doc_no, NULL AS reference_no FROM consignment_external_supplier s WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR s.consignee_company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR s.consignee_store = #{store}) AND (#{supplierCode} IS NULL OR s.supplier_code = #{supplierCode}) ORDER BY s.item_code, s.supplier_code
